title: T-128 / W0-LOGOUT — App-shell logout must clear the Supabase session before redirect
prompt:
# T-128 / W0-LOGOUT — logout actually logs out

PRD: Walking Skeleton (Wave 0) Definition of Done — `/kira:skeleton` DoD #1 (logout works).
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`

## Goal
The app-shell topbar logout was wired to an inline `signOutAction` in `apps/web/app/[locale]/(app)/layout.tsx` that only `redirect(...)`'d to `/login` WITHOUT calling `supabase.auth.signOut()`. The Supabase auth cookies survived, so the `(app)` layout guard re-admitted the user — logout did nothing. Fix: clear the Supabase session before redirecting.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/[locale]/(app)/layout.tsx` [modify] — in `signOutAction`, create `createServerSupabaseClient()` (already imported) and `await supabase.auth.signOut()` before `redirect(/${locale}/login)`. Wrap the signOut in try/catch + console.error so a transient failure still redirects (never silent — logged). Preserve the locale-resolution behavior.

## Acceptance criteria
1. Triggering logout from the app-shell topbar calls supabase.auth.signOut() (session cookies cleared) and then redirects to /<locale>/login.
2. After logout, navigating back to an (app) route redirects to login (no stale session re-admit).
3. Gates green: tsc --noEmit, eslint, next build.

## Out of scope
- The dedicated `_actions/sign-out.ts` (already correct) and the login flow itself.

## Closeout evidence
changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status, deviations, git_status.

pipeline_inputs.description: App-shell topbar logout only redirected without clearing the Supabase session, so the layout guard re-admitted the user. Call supabase.auth.signOut() before redirect.
acceptance_criteria: Triggering logout from the app-shell topbar calls supabase.auth.signOut() (session cookies cleared) and then redirects to /<locale>/login.
After logout, navigating to an (app) route redirects to login (no stale session re-admit).
Gates green: tsc --noEmit, eslint, next build.
test_strategy: Static: tsc --noEmit, eslint, next build (the change is a small server-action edit).
Manual/E2E: covered structurally by apps/web/e2e/walking-skeleton.spec.ts login/shell flow; full logout round-trip needs a real session target.
risk_red_lines: Must clear the Supabase session before redirect — a redirect-only logout is a security false-green.
Do not silently swallow signOut errors — log them, then still redirect.
